trustSignals.title: Trusted by companies worldwide
trustSignals.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to excellence and client success.

keyPoints.title: Labor law compliance
keyPoints.description: Full compliance with local labor laws including working hours, leave entitlements, termination procedures, and employee rights. We ensure all employment practices meet legal requirements.

keyPoints.title: Tax compliance
keyPoints.description: Complete tax compliance including income tax, social security, payroll taxes, and all required tax filings. We handle all tax obligations and ensure timely submissions.

keyPoints.title: Regulatory monitoring
keyPoints.description: Continuous monitoring of regulatory changes and proactive updates to ensure ongoing compliance. We track changes in real-time and notify you immediately.

keyPoints.title: Risk mitigation
keyPoints.description: Proactive identification and mitigation of compliance risks with expert legal guidance and support. We help prevent violations before they occur.

mainDescription.title: What is Compliance Services?
mainDescription.description: Compliance services ensure your business adheres to all local labor laws, tax regulations, employment standards, and regulatory requirements in every country where you operate. Our compliance solutions provide comprehensive monitoring, risk assessment, and expert legal guidance to prevent violations, maintain regulatory adherence, and protect your business from penalties and legal issues across 80+ countries.

services.title: Compliance services we provide
services.description: We provide end-to-end compliance services covering all aspects of labor law, tax, and regulatory compliance. From assessment to ongoing monitoring, we handle everything.

items.title: Labor law compliance
items.description: Full compliance with employment laws, working conditions, and employee rights. We ensure all employment practices meet legal requirements.

items.title: Tax compliance
items.description: Complete tax compliance including calculations, filings, and reporting requirements. We handle all tax obligations and ensure timely submissions.

items.title: Regulatory monitoring
items.description: Continuous monitoring of regulatory changes and compliance requirements. We track changes in real-time and provide instant notifications.

items.title: Audit & reporting
items.description: Compliance audits, reporting, and documentation for regulatory requirements. We provide comprehensive compliance documentation and audit support.

coverage.title: Compliance areas we cover
coverage.description: We provide compliance coverage across all critical areas of employment, tax, and regulatory requirements. Our comprehensive approach ensures nothing is overlooked.
coverage.guarantee: 99.9% compliance rate with full legal protection and ongoing support

process.title: How our compliance process works
process.description: Our streamlined compliance process ensures comprehensive coverage and ongoing protection. From initial assessment to continuous monitoring, we guide you through every step.

steps.title: Compliance assessment
steps.description: We assess your current compliance status, identify gaps, and create a comprehensive compliance roadmap for your operations across all jurisdictions.

steps.title: Implementation & setup
steps.description: We implement compliance measures, update policies, and ensure all requirements are met. Our team handles all documentation and process updates.

steps.title: Ongoing monitoring
steps.description: Continuous monitoring of regulatory changes, compliance status, and proactive updates. We track all changes in real-time and notify you immediately.

steps.title: Support & guidance
steps.description: Expert legal guidance, audit support, and assistance with compliance issues as they arise. We provide ongoing consultation and issue resolution.

eorBridge.title: Compliance + employer of record
eorBridge.subtitle: Complete Compliance Protection with EOR
eorBridge.description: Combine our expert compliance services with our Employer of Record (EOR) solutions for complete protection. When you use EOR, we become the legal employer and assume full compliance responsibility, eliminating your compliance burden.

benefits.title: Full compliance transfer
benefits.description: We assume complete compliance responsibility as the legal employer, eliminating your compliance burden and risk.

benefits.title: Zero compliance risk
benefits.description: All compliance risks transfer to us as the EOR, protecting your business from penalties, fines, and legal issues.

benefits.title: Expert legal team
benefits.description: Access to our team of compliance experts and legal advisors who ensure full compliance in every jurisdiction.

benefits.title: Proactive monitoring
benefits.description: Continuous monitoring and proactive updates ensure ongoing compliance without any effort from your side.

risks.title: Compliance risks without expert support
risks.description: Operating without expert compliance support exposes your business to significant risks, penalties, and legal issues. Understanding these risks helps you make informed decisions about compliance management.

risks.title: Financial penalties
risks.description: Non-compliance can result in hefty fines, penalties, and back taxes. Regulatory authorities impose significant financial penalties for violations.

risks.title: Legal liability
risks.description: Violations can lead to lawsuits, legal disputes, and damage to your business reputation. Legal issues can be costly and time-consuming.

risks.title: Business disruption
risks.description: Compliance issues can disrupt operations, delay projects, and impact business continuity. Regulatory actions can halt operations.

risks.title: Reputation damage
risks.description: Compliance violations can damage your brand reputation and affect relationships with clients, partners, and employees.

items.question: Why is compliance important?
items.answer: Compliance is critical to avoid financial penalties, legal liability, business disruption, and reputation damage. Non-compliance can result in hefty fines, lawsuits, operational shutdowns, and damage to your brand reputation. Staying compliant protects your business and ensures smooth operations.

items.question: How do you monitor regulatory changes?
items.answer: We use advanced monitoring systems that track regulatory changes in real-time across all jurisdictions. Our team of compliance experts reviews changes, assesses their impact, and provides instant notifications with guidance on required actions. We ensure you're always up-to-date with the latest requirements.

items.question: What happens if I'm not compliant?
items.answer: Non-compliance can result in financial penalties, legal liability, business disruption, and reputation damage. Regulatory authorities can impose fines, halt operations, and take legal action. Our compliance services help prevent these issues by ensuring ongoing compliance and proactive risk mitigation.

items.question: How does EOR help with compliance?
items.answer: When you use our Employer of Record (EOR) service, we become the legal employer and assume full compliance responsibility. This eliminates your compliance burden and transfers all compliance risks to us. We handle all compliance requirements, ensuring full compliance without any effort from your side.

items.question: What countries do you cover?
items.answer: We provide comprehensive compliance services across 80+ countries worldwide. Our global network and local legal expertise ensure we can support your compliance needs in almost any market. Contact us for specific country inquiries.

items.question: Do you help with GDPR and data privacy compliance?
items.answer: Yes. We are GDPR-compliant and help with data processing agreements, privacy notices, and cross-border data flows. We ensure employee and client data is handled in line with applicable privacy laws.

items.question: What if we already have a local entity?
items.answer: We can still support you with compliance monitoring, policy reviews, and advisory in countries where you have entities. For countries where you don't, our EOR solution removes the compliance burden entirely.

items.question: How do you handle works council and employee representation?
items.answer: Where works councils or employee representation apply, we work within the required processes and support information and consultation obligations. Our local teams understand these requirements in each jurisdiction.

cta.title: Ready to ensure full compliance?
cta.description: Join hundreds of companies who trust us for their global compliance needs. Get started with expert compliance management and monitoring.
